defmodule Demo.MixProject do
  use Mix.Project

  defp deps do
    [
      {:plug, ">= 1.15.0"},
      {:phoenix, "~> 1.7", only: [:dev, :test]},
      {:gettext, git: "https://github.com/elixir-lang/gettext.git", tag: "0.26.2"},
      {:local_dependency, path: "../local_dependency"}
    ]
  end
end
